title: Seven Chapters of the Mysterious Lord

params.name: Seven Chapters of the Mysterious Lord
params.description: The Seven Chapters of the Mysterious Lord is a fictional work within the Cthulhu Mythos, purportedly written by the ancient Chinese philosopher Xuan Jun. This document appeared around the 2nd century CE, originally titled the Seven Secret Teachings of the Earth, but the original version has been lost, with detailed copies surviving. The book contains profound philosophy and involves spells and supernatural knowledge, serving as a key text connecting the real and mysterious realms, blending Taois …
